name: Southwest Chicken & Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 package Success Rice, cooked according to package directions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet, brown the chicken in oil; remove from skillet.
2. Cook the peppers and onion until tender-crisp.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients and chicken.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cover.
6. Simmer for 30 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
7. Serve over rice.
8. Refrigerate leftovers.
